Notice Of Hearing And Claim For Surplus Funds; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; And Declaration
Off Calendar Feb-07-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

RESPONDENT JARVIS LEWIS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE ESTATE OF EDDIE MAE LUCKETT NOTICE OF HEARING AND CLAIM FOR SURPLUS FUNDS; MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES; AND DECLARATION is GRANTED. Funds held by the Court in case CPF-23-518379 shall be transferred to case PES-22-305568 to be held by the Court and be distributed therein.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deposit Surplus Funds Pursuant To Civil Code 2924j And To Discharge Petitioner
Off Calendar Apr-11-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PETITIONER QUALITY LOAN SERVICE CORP.'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO DEPOSIT SURPLUS FUNDS PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE 2924J AND TO DISCHARGE PETITIONER is GRANTED as requested. Petitioner shall deposit the surplus funds forthwith and shall be thereafter discharged.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deposit Surplus Funds Pursuant To Civil Code 2924j And To Discharge Petitioner

MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PETITIONER QUALITY LOAN SERVICE CORP.'s Motion To Deposit Surplus Funds Pursuant To Civil Code 2924j And To Discharge Petitioner.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.
